        public JkIml.Component addModuleOrderEntry(java.lang.String moduleName,

      • replaceLibByModule

        public JkIml.Component replaceLibByModule(java.lang.String libPathEndsWithFilter,
                                          java.lang.String moduleName)
        Replaces the specified library with the specified module. The library is specified by the end of its path. For example, '-foo.bar' will replace 'mylibs/core-foo.jar' by the specified module. Only the first matching lib is replaced.

      • setModuleAttributes

        public JkIml.Component setModuleAttributes(java.lang.String moduleName,
                                           JkIml.Scope scope,
                                           java.lang.Boolean exported)
        Sets the scope and exported attribute to the specified module.
        Parameters:
        moduleName - The module to set attributes on.
        scope - If null, scope remains unchanged.
        exported - If null, scope remains unchanged.
        Returns:
        This object for chaining.
